name: LinkedIn
description: LinkedIn is a professional networking platform for career development, recruiting, and business connections.

years.notes: Founding-era 'in' mark — rounded blue square with white lowercase 'in' and a subtle upper-left highlight sheen (early web-2.0 glossy aesthetic). The full 'Linked in' wordmark is too wide for a 24x24 canvas, so the badge portion is rendered standalone, consistent with how LinkedIn deployed the icon-only mark across favicons and share buttons during 2003-2011. Vector sourced from Wikimedia Commons (uploaded 2010, refined 2012 from LinkedIn brand guidelines).

2011 brand refresh 'in' badge extracted from the official LinkedIn wordmark SVG (uploaded to Wikimedia Commons March 2011 from LinkedIn brand guidelines). Flat blue square with slightly rounded corners — more rigid than the 2019 refresh — and a refined Avenir-style 'in' glyph (no gloss/sheen). Used as the standalone icon mark 2011-2019.
Current 'in' mark on blue square (2019 refresh). Trace from simple-icons, not brand-kit official.
